pool.baseline: it's so quiet here. like, i walk through the house and it doesn't even feel like my own anymore. everything just feels... empty. i wake up and for a split second i forget, and then it hits me all over again that he's gone. i don't even know why i'm bothering with the chores or the cooking or anything. it feels like i'm just a ghost haunting a life that ended months ago.

pool.baseline: i was just looking at some stuff about the heat death of the universe... and it just hit me how much of a joke everything is. like we're all just fighting so hard to exist, to build things, to love, but in a few billion years there isn't even going to be a single atom left to remember we were even here. it feels so pointless to even try anymore. why bother?

pool.baseline: The candlelight flickers low, much like the waning strength in my very soul. He is gone... the betrayal cuts deeper than any blade, leaving only a hollow ache where my heart once beat. There is no dawn left for me, only this endless, suffocating twilight. I feel as though I am already a ghost, drifting through a world that has no place for a broken thing like me. It would be so much kinder, wouldn't it... to simply let the shadows take me? To slip away into the velvet dark and never wake to this agony again?
